actor_claims.quote_text: the Board appointed a subcommittee of two independent directors
Greene Holcomb & Fisher LLC (the business of which was subsequently acquired by BMO Capital Markets Corp. and which we refer to as “GHF” prior to such acquisition and “BMO” thereafter)
Greene Holcomb & Fisher LLC (the business of which was subsequently acquired by BMO Capital Markets Corp. and which we refer to as “GHF” prior to such acquisition and “BMO” thereafter)
the Company’s legal counsel, Hinckley, Allen & Snyder LLP (which we refer to as “Hinckley Allen”)
Party E (a strategic buyer) submitted an LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $21.26 per share
Party F (a strategic buyer) submitted an LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $19.20 per share

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Following this presentation, the Board approved the subcommittee’s recommendation and the Company engaged GHF.
representatives of BMO (which acquired the business of GHF on August 1, 2016)
the Company’s legal counsel, Hinckley, Allen & Snyder LLP (which we refer to as “Hinckley Allen”)
On August 1, 2016, Party D submitted a revised LOI at a price of $24.00 per share and Party E submitted a revised LOI, along with financing support, from Party F, at a price of $23.81 per share.

bid_claims.quote_text: G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $25.00 per share in cash

event_claims.description: The Board concluded it was in the best interest of the Company and its shareholders to proceed with the transaction strategy discussed with GHF.
event_claims.quote_text: At a special meeting of the Board held on March 14, 2016, representatives of GHF discussed their evaluation of the Company’s business operations and strategy for improving operational and financial performance, as well as railroad industry dynamics more generally and their impact on current railroad valuations.

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A and other potential buyers to determine interest in a change in control transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A as well as other potential buyers to determine their level of interest in a change in control transaction.

event_claims.description: GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers and 18 potential financial buyers during the week of March 28, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: During the week of March 28, 2016, in accordance with the Transaction Committee’s directives, representatives of GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers (including Party A) and 18 potential financial buyers.

event_claims.description: The Company received six LOIs in late July 2016 with offer prices from $19.20 to $24.00 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: In late July 2016, the Company received six LOIs with offer prices per share ranging from $19.20 to $24.00 (implying equity values of $96 million to $121 million).

event_claims.description: G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for $25.00 per share in cash on August 12, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $25.00 per share in cash, which excluded the previously proposed CVR, together with mark-ups of the merger agreement and the voting agreement.

participation_count_claims.quote_text: Between May 19, 2016 and June 1, 2016, the Company received nine written indications of interest (“IOIs”) from potential buyers, with offer prices per share ranging from $17.93 to $26.50 (assuming the conversion of preferred stock into common stock), implying equity values of $90 million to $134 million.
In late July 2016, the Company received six LOIs with offer prices per share ranging from $19.20 to $24.00 (implying equity values of $96 million to $121 million).
